question: Which statement about the output levels over the years is best supported by the chart?

options.A: Output declined in every consecutive year shown.
options.B: The chart does not allow a clear comparison of output between the last two years.
options.C: Output in the last two years is identical.
options.D: Output in the middle year was the highest of the period.

explanation: Values exceeding the y-axis range are clipped, making the top bars look the same and misleading viewers.
